codeReview.summary: The feature mostly matches the Mini home rendering contract, but the duplicate-card selector can replace a completed digest with a newer placeholder/staler row, so the rendered card for a canonical stock_code is not reliably the correct compact card.

issues.description: The dedupe path does not actually choose the correct canonical card when duplicate rows exist. `parseCompactTimestamp()` only reads `updated_at || task_updated_at`, and `shouldReplaceDigestCard()` compares only that single timestamp. That means a newer pending placeholder row will replace an older ready digest for the same `stock_code`, and a row with a fresher `task_updated_at` but older `updated_at` is treated as stale. In both cases the Mini home can hide completed digest content even though this feature is supposed to keep one correct compact card per canonical `stock_code` while only using placeholders for stocks that do not yet have completed digests.

summary: Reviewed the feature entry, worker handoff/transcript skeleton, mobile-contract-worker skill, mission guidance, and commit `e2d45af`. I found one blocking correctness issue in the duplicate-card selection logic: duplicate digest rows are resolved by a timestamp heuristic that can surface a placeholder or otherwise stale row instead of the correct compact card for that stock.
